deathPlace.address: St Saviour's Monastery, Bermondsey, Surrey, England buried at Canterbury Cathedral, Kent

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Margaret de Holland, Countess of Somerset (1385-31 December 1439) was the daughter of Thomas Holland, 2nd Earl of Kent, who was the son of Joan "the Fair Maid of Kent" (granddaughter of Edward I of England, wife of Edward the Black Prince and mother of Richard II of England). Margaret's mother was Alice FitzAlan, daughter of Richard FitzAlan, 10th Earl of Arundel and Eleanor of Lancaster.

Margaret married John Beaufort, 1st Earl of Somerset, son of John of Gaunt, 1st Duke of Lancaster and his mistress Katherine Swynford. They had six children:

1.) Henry Beaufort, 2nd Earl of Somerset (c. 1401-25 November 1418).

2.) John Beaufort, 1st Duke of Somerset (baptized 25 March 1404-27 May 1444).

3.) Thomas Beaufort, Count of Perche (c. 1405-1431).

4.) Lady Joan Beaufort (c. 1406-15 July 1445), who married James I of Scotland and Sir James Stewart, the Black Knight of Lorn.

5.) Edmund Beaufort, 2nd Duke of Somerset (c. 1406-22 May 1455).

6.) Lady Margaret Beaufort, Countess of Devon (c. 1409-1449), married Thomas de Courtenay, 13th Earl of Devon.

In 1399, she was invested as a Lady Companion, Order of the Garter (L.G.). After Beaufort died in 1410 (in the Tower of London), she married his nephew Thomas of Lancaster, 1st Duke of Clarence, the son of King Henry IV. They had no children. She died on 31 December 1439 at St. Saviour's Abbey, Bermondsey, in London, England. Margaret and both her husbands are buried together in a carved alabaster tomb in Canterbury Cathedral that shows her lying between the two of them.

«b»Descendants«/b»
Through her son, the 1st Duke of Somerset, Lady Margaret is an ancestress to the Tudor monarchs. Both Lady Joan, Queen consort of Scotland, and the Duke of Somerset, are ancestors of King George I of Great Britain. As such, both children are ancestors to the current British royal family.

Lady Margaret's sister, Alianore Holland, the Countess of March is also a direct ancestor of George Washington, 1st President of the United States of America.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence於1385年12月30日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭時，她的父親Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent35歲，母親Alice FitzAlan36歲。她於1399年4月23日與John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset在英國英格蘭藍卡爾武普 霍蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年12月30日在英國英格蘭素瑞貝爾蒙享年54歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howland
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence was born on 30 December 1385, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, was 35 and her mother, Alice FitzAlan, was 36. She married John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset on 23 April 1399, in Up Holland, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 30 December 1439, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence è nata il il 30 dicembre 1385 nel Up Holland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Alice FitzAlan, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset il 23 aprile 1399, nel Up Holland, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 30 dicembre 1439, nel Bermondsey, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.Westminster, Middlesex, England: イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスター
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarenceが1385年12月30日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドで生まれた時，父Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kentは35歳，母Alice FitzAlanは36歳であった。1399年4月23日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウップ ホーランドでJohn Beaufort 1st Earl of Somersetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年12月30日にイギリスイギリススリーバーモンドセイで54歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーカンテルブリー カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.killed at the Battle of Baugé, Saumur, M: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 소머
ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: 영국 미들레세스 플레신크트 프 스트 캐더이인
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence(이)가 1385년 12월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzAlan(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1399년 4월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 업 홀랜드에서 John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 12월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 버몽시에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.30 December 1385–30 December 1439: 30 de dezembro de 1385–30 de dezembro de 1439
pt.killed at the Battle of Baugé, Saumur, M: Saumur, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.Upholland, Lancashire, England: Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence nasceu em 30 de dezembro de 1385, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzAlan, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset em 23 de abril de 1399, em Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de dezembro de 1439, em Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.Precinct of St Katherine, Middlesex, Eng: пресинкт оф ст катираин, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence родилась 30 декабря 1385 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzAlan, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset 23 апреля 1399 г. в местности уп холланд, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 30 декабря 1439 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence nació el 30 de diciembre de 1385, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Holland 2nd Earl of Kent, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Alice FitzAlan, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset el 23 de abril de 1399, en Up Holland, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 30 de diciembre de 1439, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
